# .github Folder

This folder stores repository-level guidance for AI agents and shared project automation metadata.

## Contents

- copilot-instructions.md: always-on implementation and maintenance rules for future AI agents

## Maintenance Notes

- Keep this folder small and explicit.
- Add new files here only when they change repository-wide behavior or guidance.
- If agent or automation behavior changes, update this README so future maintainers can understand why the file exists.
